strengths: Expert-level TypeScript/Node.js proficiency with proven fullstack capability in React, databases, and cloud infrastructure (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes)
Strong commitment to software craftsmanship, TDD, and clean architecture—directly aligned with role requirements
Extensive experience with both consumer-facing products and complex backend systems (microservices, real-time data processing)
concerns: Significantly overqualified for junior/mid-level role—Staff-level engineer with 14+ years of experience; likely salary expectations and retention risk
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience mentioned, despite job preference for these specific technologies
Geographic clarity needed—resume shows Lagos, Nigeria as location but role requires high on-site presence; previous roles span Europe and North America
response.justification: This candidate demonstrates exceptional technical depth and genuine commitment to software craftsmanship across the full stack. However, the fundamental issue is overqualification: a Staff-level engineer with 14+ years of experience significantly exceeds the junior/mid-level scope, creating realistic concerns about salary alignment, role satisfaction, and retention. While technically strong in TypeScript and the broader stack, they lack explicitly documented PostgreSQL and Nest.js experience. Geographic clarity is also needed regarding the on-site requirement.
